name: Breadfruit Donuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beaten egg, breadfruit pulp, and shortening. Mix well.
2. Add sifted dry ingredients to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into preheated deep fat (370°F) and fry until golden brown.
4. Drain on paper towels or a brown bag.
5. Shake in a bag with sugar to coat outside.
Makes about 1 1/2 dozen donuts.
